bead.title: test: prove redaction and visibility parity edge cases
bead.description:
Context: The PRD requires reusable RBAC/ABAC/field/relationship visibility controls below all surfaces. Remaining proof gaps include STP-046 AC4, STP-047 AC3, STP-102 AC1/AC4, and related audit redaction/nullability behavior.

In-scope files: policy contract tests in `crates/axon-server/tests/`, policy/read implementation in `crates/axon-api/` or `crates/axon-graphql/` only as required, and affected STP markdown rows.
Out-of-scope: UI DOM-leak assertions and candidate-policy dry-run behavior.
Implementation hint: assert generated GraphQL nullability for redactable required fields, read-time redaction for JSON-Schema-required fields, ABAC mirror cases, and same redaction in query results/detail/audit after-state.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cargo test -p axon-server --test graphql_policy_contract` passes.
2. `cargo test -p axon-server --test feat_029_contract_parent` passes.
3. The executable @covers scanner reports coverage for every STP-046/STP-047/STP-102 row changed by this bead.
4. Updated STP rows cite the exact test evidence.
